name: Video Color Grade
description: One-click subtle color grading for any video. Samples brightness/contrast/saturation via ffmpeg signalstats and emits a per-clip eq filter capped at ±8% per axis (no creative LUTs). Falls back to the named 'subtle' / 'neutral_punch' / 'warm_cinematic' presets when auto analysis is unavailable.

description_i18n.zh: 一键调色插件：通过 ffmpeg signalstats 采样亮度/对比度/饱和度，生成每段视频的微调参数，所有调整换轴默认 ±8% 上限，什么场景都不会过调。也可直接选 "subtle / neutral_punch / warm_cinematic" 预设。
description_i18n.en: One-click subtle color grading for any video. Samples brightness/contrast/saturation via ffmpeg signalstats and emits a per-clip eq filter capped at ±8% per axis (no creative LUTs). Falls back to the named 'subtle' / 'neutral_punch' / 'warm_cinematic' presets when auto analysis is unavailable.

author: OpenAkita
